visuals.title: Memory Allocation Process
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Memory Allocation Process
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Dynamic Memory Allocation</text>

  <!-- Heap Memory Block -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="320" height="200" fill="#E3E3E3" stroke="#999" stroke-width="1" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="50" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Heap Memory
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Allocated Blocks -->
  <rect x="70" y="80" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    malloc()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="170" y="80" width="100" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="112" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    calloc()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="290" y="80" width="60" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="97" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    realloc()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Free Memory Space -->
  <rect x="70" y="150" width="280" height="40" fill="#E8F5E9" stroke="#4CAF50" stroke-width="1" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#2E7D32" opacity="0">
    Free Memory
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Freed Block -->
  <rect x="170" y="210" width="100" height="30" fill="#FFEBEE" stroke="#F44336" stroke-width="1" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="229" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#C62828" opacity="0">
    free()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Pointer Arrows -->
  <line x1="120" y1="50" x2="120" y2="80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="220" y1="50" x2="220" y2="80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="320" y1="50" x2="320" y2="80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Legend -->
  <rect x="50" y="280" width="320" height="60" fill="white" stroke="#999" stroke-width="1" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="295" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Legend
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="70" y="305" width="15" height="15" fill="#2196F3" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="95" y="317" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Allocated Memory
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="180" y="305" width="15" height="15" fill="#E8F5E9" stroke="#4CAF50" stroke-width="1" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="205" y="317" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Free Memory
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="290" y="305" width="15" height="15" fill="#FFEBEE" stroke="#F44336" stroke-width="1" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="315" y="317" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Freed Memory
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
